docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UYANIK, ALI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FELL STREET SERVICE STATION, INC. NOTHING. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S AUTOMOBILE WAS DUE TO HIS OWN NEGLIGENCE. IT WAS NOT DUE TO ANY FAULT OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,930.33 FILED BY UYANIK, ALI AS TO DEFENDANT FELL STREET SERVICE STATION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF UYANIK, ALI AS TO DEFENDANT FELL STREET SERVICE STATION, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-15-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FELL STREET SERVICE STATION, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARIAN HANSEN (ADMINISTRATOR) FILED BY DEFENDANT FELL STREET SERVICE STATION, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF ALI UYANIK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FELL STREET SERVICE STATION, INC. IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS MARIAN HANSEN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
